subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-10-08
subcodes.first_line: In all the religions of God there is an exposition concerning unity. What is the basis of this unity?
subcodes.first_line_orig: امشب الحمد لله در کلیسای موحدینم کلیساایکه منسوب بتوحید است لهذا خواستم ذکری از
subcodes.subjects: @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @oneness; unity of religion, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @love and unity
